query: 对比易方达和华夏基金整体重仓股前20

args.sql: WITH latest_date AS (SELECT MAX(date) AS date FROM fund_holding), e_fund AS (SELECT stock_code, stock_name, holding_quantity, holding_value, nav_ratio FROM fund_holding WHERE fund_code = 'EFUND_CODE' AND date = (SELECT date FROM latest_date) ORDER BY holding_quantity DESC LIMIT 20), hx_fund AS (SELECT stock_code, stock_name, holding_quantity, holding_value, nav_ratio FROM fund_holding WHERE fund_code = 'HX_CODE' AND date = (SELECT date FROM latest_date) ORDER BY holding_quantity DESC LIMIT 20) SELECT '易方达' AS 基金名称, stock_code AS 股票代码, stock_name AS 股票名称, holding_quantity AS 持股数量, holding_value AS 持股市值, nav_ratio AS 持股占比 FROM e_fund UNION ALL SELECT '华夏' AS 基金名称, stock_code AS 股票代码, stock_name AS 股票名称, holding_quantity AS 持股数量, holding_value AS 持股市值, nav_ratio AS 持股占比 FROM hx_fund LIMIT 40

plan.rationale: 查询两个基金最新持仓中持股数量最多的前20名，合并显示以便对比

notes: 未指定日期，使用最新持仓日期
查询两个基金最新持仓中持股数量最多的前20名，合并显示以便对比
SQL 由 LLM/规则生成，并经过只读白名单校验和 dry run。

metadata.sql: WITH latest_date AS (SELECT MAX(date) AS date FROM fund_holding), e_fund AS (SELECT stock_code, stock_name, holding_quantity, holding_value, nav_ratio FROM fund_holding WHERE fund_code = 'EFUND_CODE' AND date = (SELECT date FROM latest_date) ORDER BY holding_quantity DESC LIMIT 20), hx_fund AS (SELECT stock_code, stock_name, holding_quantity, holding_value, nav_ratio FROM fund_holding WHERE fund_code = 'HX_CODE' AND date = (SELECT date FROM latest_date) ORDER BY holding_quantity DESC LIMIT 20) SELECT '易方达' AS 基金名称, stock_code AS 股票代码, stock_name AS 股票名称, holding_quantity AS 持股数量, holding_value AS 持股市值, nav_ratio AS 持股占比 FROM e_fund UNION ALL SELECT '华夏' AS 基金名称, stock_code AS 股票代码, stock_name AS 股票名称, holding_quantity AS 持股数量, holding_value AS 持股市值, nav_ratio AS 持股占比 FROM hx_fund LIMIT 40

args.sql:
WITH e_fund AS (SELECT stock_code AS 股票代码, stock_name AS 股票名称, holding_quantity AS 持股数量, holding_value AS 持股市值, nav_ratio AS 持股占比 FROM fund_holding WHERE fund_code = 'EFUND_CODE' AND date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_holding WHERE fund_code = 'EFUND_CODE') ORDER BY holding_quantity DESC LIMIT 20),
china_fund AS (SELECT stock_code AS 股票代码, stock_name AS 股票名称, holding_quantity AS 持股数量, holding_value AS 持股市值, nav_ratio AS 持股占比 FROM fund_holding WHERE fund_code = 'CHINA_FUND_CODE' AND date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_holding WHERE fund_code = 'CHINA_FUND_CODE') ORDER BY holding_quantity DESC LIMIT 20)
SELECT '易方达' AS 基金名称, 股票代码, 股票名称, 持股数量, 持股市值, 持股占比 FROM e_fund
UNION ALL
SELECT '华夏' AS 基金名称, 股票代码, 股票名称, 持股数量, 持股市值, 持股占比 FROM china_fund LIMIT 40;

china_fund AS (SELECT stock_code AS 股票代码, stock_name AS 股票名称, holding_quantity AS 持股数量, holding_value AS 持股市值, nav_ratio AS 持股占比 FROM fund_holding WHERE fund_code = 'CHINA_FUND_CODE' AND date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_holding WHERE fund_code = 'CHINA_FUND_CODE') ORDER BY holding_quantity DESC LIMIT 20)
SELECT '易方达' AS 基金名称, 股票代码, 股票名称, 持股数量, 持股市值, 持股占比 FROM e_fund
UNION ALL
SELECT '华夏' AS 基金名称, 股票代码, 股票名称, 持股数量, 持股市值, 持股占比 FROM china_fund LIMIT 40;
